## What this changes

A short description of the change and the motivation.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Data contract change (schemas or engine types)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] If a data contract changed, the schema and the TypeScript type were updated together
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
